tips: The Morning/Day/Night Cycle is a total of 3.5 hours real-time.
Use /help to see all available commands!
Running/Biking in grass has a higher encounter rate!
Some Pokemon can only be found by smashing rocks or cutting trees!
Increase your Trainer Rank for better catch rates!
Use your SHIFT key to toggle running!
Dark areas require a Lantern for better visibility!
Some Pokemon are easier to catch with a higher Trainer Rank.
Rare resources are often found away from the main roads.
Some items can only be created through Crafting.
There are different spawns during the morning/day/night.
The Kanto Region is having a large influx of Johto Pokemon due to mass migration that is still being studied; this is where you come in.
